_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Reporting period 2030: 45% CO₂ reduction target applies for all sub-groups except vocational vehicles; ZLEV incentive factor expires (set to 1); 90% zero-emission mandate for urban buses; 10% trailer (semi) and 7.5% trailer (drawbar) reduction targets begin.
prior.source_span: (b) 45 % for all vehicle sub-groups other than vocational vehicles for the reporting periods of the years 2030 to 2034
